title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 379.980 - Reorganization of domestic mutual insurance company, authority
text:
379.980.  Reorganization of domestic mutual insurance company, authority. — A domestic mutual insurance company organized and operating under this chapter may reorganize by forming a mutual insurance holding company as described in section 379.985, or by merging its policyholders' membership into such a mutual insurance holding company.  The reorganized insurance company shall continue its corporate existence, either at the time of the reorganization or at some later time as a stock insurance company, or as a mutual insurance company.  This authority is in addition to powers granted pursuant to chapter 382.
(L. 1996 S.B. 759)
